title: Fluffy Mexican Tortilla Tacos
description: A fluffy and sour twist on traditional Mexican tacos, featuring naan bread and a variety of bold flavors.
instructions: Cut the naan bread into small squares to create the tortilla base.
In a separate pan, warm the tortillas over medium heat for 2-3 minutes on each side.
In a small bowl, mix together the lime juice, vinegar, and chopped cilantro.
Using a nigiri-shaping technique, shape the tortillas into small triangles and place a spoonful of the lime juice mixture onto each triangle.
